methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: archive Create stronger customer pull and adoption
companyObjectives.statement: Focus the period on customer outcomes that increase adoption, conversion, and trust in the core journey rather than output volume.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Matches Empowered-style product objectives by centering on customer and business outcomes that teams can discover into.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's growth tradeoffs.
Provides evidence and product context for the objective's growth tradeoffs.

companyObjectives.title: archive Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Parking control tower convergence: validated discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.

objectives.title: 2025-Q3 Stabilize the post-rebrand parking operating core
objectives.objective: Keep parking operations commercially credible during the Arrive rebrand by preserving operator trust while converging core controls.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Economic return generated from parking assets after direct operating costs and leakage.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue retained from existing parking operator accounts.

keyResults.target: Protect operator economics during platform transition
keyResults.baseline: Operators were concerned about change during the new corporate-brand rollout
keyResults.statement: Increase net parking yield by keeping pricing, payment, and compliance controls stable while core systems converge.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve net parking yield by keeping pricing, payment, and compliance controls stable while core systems converge via Parking Configuration & Policy Management and Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for net parking yield, aligned with its focus on own permits, access-control, LPR, and parking-compliance workflows across channels and sites via Access, Permit & LPR Control and Enforcement & Compliance Workflows.

Support the KR by contributing capability for net parking yield, aligned with its focus on own the shared ledger, settlement, and reconciliation backbone across parking, transit, business, and partners via Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's growth tradeoffs.
Provides evidence and product context for the objective's growth tradeoffs.

objectives.title: 2025-Q4 Establish a credible open-payment transit operating model
objectives.objective: Create enough reliability and rollout discipline that transit authorities see Arrive as an operational partner rather than a risky modernization vendor.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Time required for passengers to board and validate payment.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring revenue from transit payment, devices, and operational services.

keyResults.target: Show that payment modernization does not slow real-world service
keyResults.baseline: Transit buyers were skeptical of operational disruption during rollout
keyResults.statement: Reduce average boarding time by keeping validation fast and failure handling operationally manageable.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce average boarding time by keeping validation fast and failure handling operationally manageable via Device & Validator Management and Transit Operations Telemetry.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for average boarding time, aligned with its focus on own observability, platform reliability, incident response, and service-health operations via Observability & Reliability Operations.

Support the KR by contributing capability for average boarding time, aligned with its focus on own fare rules, open payment, tap processing, and transport payment orchestration via Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.
Provides evidence and product context for the objective's operations tradeoffs.
